title: Dials Decide the Battle
description: Dials, mantra, and guerrilla tactics make every fight in Upper Yard unpredictable and dangerous.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Eneru, Enel, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Gan Fall. Dials, mantra, and guerrilla tactics make every fight in Upper Yard unpredictable and dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: ONLY THEN SHOULD YOU COME WITH ME!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: I'm going to cut off enel's head.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Waipa!! You idiot! You want to die!!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There are still two more priests.

summary: Dials, mantra, and guerrilla tactics make every fight in Upper Yard unpredictable and dangerous.
